title: Starforged Companion
description: A companion module for Ironsworn: Starforged supporting solo and multiplayer campaigns. Handles move interpretation, dice resolution, AI narration, oracle integration, progress tracking, entity management with AI portrait generation, and safety configuration.

starforged-companion.attribution: Ironsworn: Starforged by Shawn Tomkin (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)

recommends.reason: Character sheet integration — health, spirit, momentum, debilities, and XP are read from and written to the Ironsworn Actor. The module works without it but character persistence requires it.
